title: AI Space Explorer
description: Uses the default AI provider to turn a photo into a cinematic space exploration scene.
positive_prompt: Transform the input photo into a cinematic space exploration scene. Preserve the number of people, recognizable identity, facial features, expression, pose, camera angle, and main composition. Reimagine the subject as an elite astronaut or intergalactic explorer in a detailed futuristic suit, standing on an alien planet with stars, galaxies, and colorful nebulae in the sky. Use dramatic science-fiction lighting, realistic materials, sharp focus, and premium movie-production realism.
negative_prompt: cartoon, anime, low quality, blurry, changed identity, distorted face, deformed body, extra limbs, extra fingers, bad anatomy, watermark, logo, text, low detail, broken helmet, poor lighting, noise, pixelated, horror elements, unrealistic proportions, cropped subject
